allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/health" -Method GET -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "Health check failed: $_" })
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/health" | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($schema = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json"; $trigger = $schema.paths.'/api/v1/review/trigger'.post.requestBody.content.'application/json'.schema.properties; Write-Output "=== ReviewTriggerRequest fields ==="; $trigger.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Value.type\)" })

PowerShell($schema = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/openapi.json"; $trigger = $schema.paths.'/api/v1/review/trigger'.post.requestBody.content.'application/json'.schema; Write-Output \($trigger | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3\))
PowerShell(ConvertTo-Json *)
PowerShell(cd "E:\\ai code review\\code-review-bot"; $env:PYTHONPATH = "E:\\ai code review\\code-review-bot"; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe scripts/test_incremental.py)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/health"; Write-Output "Server: $\($r.status\)")

PowerShell($sessions = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions?page=1&page_size=5"; Write-Output "Total: $\($sessions.total\)"; foreach \($s in $sessions.sessions\) { Write-Output "  $\($s.session_id\) | PR#$\($s.pr_number\) | $\($s.status\) | findings=$\($s.total_findings\)" })

PowerShell($sessions = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions?page=1&page_size=2"; $firstId = $sessions.sessions[0].id; Write-Output "First session ID: $firstId"; Write-Output "---"; try { $report = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/review/$firstId/report"; Write-Output "Status: $\($report.status\)"; Write-Output "Findings count: $\($report.findings.Count\)"; Write-Output "Severity: $\($report.severity_counts | ConvertTo-Json\)"; Write-Output "OK" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($sessions = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions?page=1&page_size=2"; $firstId = $sessions.sessions[0].id; $response = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/review/$firstId/report"; Write-Output "Content-Type: $\($response.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "---Body \(first 500 chars\)---"; $response.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $response.Content.Length\)\))
PowerShell(cd "E:\\ai code review\\code-review-bot"; $env:PYTHONPATH = "E:\\ai code review\\code-review-bot"; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe scripts/debug_viewreport.py)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "ROOT STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Content-Type: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; Write-Output "Length: $\($r.Content.Length\) chars" } catch { Write-Output "Root failed: $_" }; Write-Output "---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/docs" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "DOCS STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Docs failed: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/repos" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Repos: $\($r.StatusCode\) - $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "Repos: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Sessions: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Sessions: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/dashboard" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Dashboard: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $body = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "  Repos: $\($body.total_repos\)"; Write-Output "  Sessions: $\($body.total_sessions\)"; Write-Output "  Findings: $\($body.total_findings\)" } catch { Write-Output "Dashboard: $_" }; Write-Output "---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/repos" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Repos list: $\($r.StatusCode\) - $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "Repos list: $_" }; Write-Output "---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/maintenance/status" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Maintenance: $\($r.StatusCode\) - $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "Maintenance: $_" })

PowerShell($sessions = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions?page_size=5" -TimeoutSec 5; if \($sessions.sessions.Count -gt 0\) { $sid = $sessions.sessions[0].id; Write-Output "Session ID: $sid"; Write-Output "Status: $\($sessions.sessions[0].status\)"; Write-Output "Findings: $\($sessions.sessions[0].total_findings\)"; Write-Output "---"; $report = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/review/$sid/report" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Report findings count: $\($report.findings.Count\)"; Write-Output "Report status: $\($report.status\)"; $report.findings | Select-Object -First 2 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  Finding: $\($_.title\) [$\($_.severity\)]" } } else { Write-Output "No sessions found" })
PowerShell(Start-Process "http://localhost:8000/")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Dashboard ==="; try { $d = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/dashboard" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "OK: repos=$\($d.total_repos\) sessions=$\($d.total_sessions\) findings=$\($d.total_findings\)"; Write-Output "Status counts: $\($d.status_counts | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" }; Write-Output "=== Sessions ==="; try { $s = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions?page=1&page_size=20" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "OK: total=$\($s.total\) page=$\($s.page\) count=$\($s.sessions.Count\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(1..10 | ForEach-Object { try { $d = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/dashboard" -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "Attempt $_`: repos=$\($d.total_repos\) sessions=$\($d.total_sessions\) findings=$\($d.total_findings\)" } catch { Write-Output "Attempt $_`: FAILED - $_" } })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions?page_size=2" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Headers:"; $r.Headers.GetEnumerator\(\) | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.Key\): $\($_.Value\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Test 1: concurrent calls ==="; $j1 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/dashboard" -TimeoutSec 5; $j2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions?page_size=5" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Dashboard: repos=$\($j1.total_repos\) sessions=$\($j1.total_sessions\) findings=$\($j1.total_findings\)"; Write-Output "Sessions: total=$\($j2.total\)"; Write-Output "=== Test 2: check if DB connection stays alive ==="; 1..5 | ForEach-Object { try { $s = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions?page_size=1" -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "Call $_ OK: $\($s.sessions[0].id.Substring\(0,8\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "Call $_ FAILED" } })

PowerShell(foreach \($status in @\('pending', 'reviewing', 'completed', 'failed', 'garbage'\)\) { try { $s = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions?status=$status&page_size=5" -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "status='$status': total=$\($s.total\)" } catch { Write-Output "status='$status': ERROR" } })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Direct session query with empty filter ==="; $s1 = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions?page=1&page_size=20" -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Output "No filter: total=$\($s1.total\) sessions=$\($s1.sessions.Count\)"; Write-Output "First session ID: $\($s1.sessions[0].id\)"; Write-Output "First session pr_title contains special chars: $\($s1.sessions[0].pr_title -match '[<>""'''']'\)"; Write-Output "=== All sessions check for null fields ==="; $all = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/sessions?page_size=50" -TimeoutSec 3; $all.sessions | ForEach-Object { $nulls = @\(\); if \(-not $_.id\) { $nulls += 'id' }; if \(-not $_.pr_title\) { $nulls += 'pr_title' }; if \(-not $_.status\) { $nulls += 'status' }; if \($nulls.Count -gt 0\) { Write-Output "Session $\($_.pr_number\): NULL fields: $nulls" } }; Write-Output "All sessions have required fields: $\($all.sessions.Count -gt 0\)")
